profiles.name: Rahul Kumar Sahani
profiles.title: MERN Stack Developer | Prompt Engineer
profiles.bio: Focused on building scalable MERN stack applications, designing efficient backend APIs, and leveraging AI with prompt engineering to develop intelligent digital solutions.
profiles.aboutMe:
I am a passionate MERN Stack Developer and Prompt Engineer with experience building responsive and scalable web applications. I specialize in developing full-stack solutions using MongoDB, Express.js, React.js, and Node.js, along with working knowledge of MySQL for relational database management.

During my Full Stack Web Development Internship at CodeSoft, I worked on building responsive frontend modules and developing backend APIs using modern JavaScript technologies. This experience helped me strengthen my skills in creating efficient and user-friendly applications.

I have also completed coursework from MongoDB University, gaining hands-on experience in database management, data modeling, and backend optimization.

I enjoy solving real-world problems, learning new technologies, and building modern applications that deliver scalable and meaningful user experiences.

projects.title: Doctor Appointment Booking System
projects.description: A MERN stack doctor appointment booking system with authentication and appointment scheduling features.

projects.title: E-commerce Website
projects.description: A full-stack MERN e-commerce application with authentication, product browsing, cart system, order management, admin dashboard, and secure payment processing.

projects.title: Portfolio Website
projects.description: A modern responsive portfolio website to showcase skills, projects, and experience.

experiences.description: Worked on front-end development using HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and React along with backend development using Node.js and Express. Built responsive applications and integrated REST APIs.
Completed MongoDB training covering data modeling, aggregation pipelines, indexing, and database performance optimization.
Learned cloud computing fundamentals including IaaS, PaaS, SaaS models and core cloud architecture concepts.

educations.institution: Dhanalakshmi Srinivasan College of Engineering and Technology

contactmessages.name: Test User
contactmessages.message: Hello Rahul, I saw your portfolio and would like to connect with you regarding a development opportunity.
